blocks.text: ▪authentication: proving you are who you say you are

• cellular networks provides hardware identity via SIM card; no such hardware assist in traditional Internet ▪confidentiality: via encryption ▪integrity checks: digital signatures prevent/detect tampering ▪access restrictions: password-protected VPNs ▪firewalls: specialized “middleboxes” in access and core
▪off-by-default: filter incoming packets to restrict senders, receivers,

raw_text: Lines of defense: ▪authentication: proving you are who you say you are • cellular networks provides hardware identity via SIM card; no such hardware assist in traditional Internet ▪confidentiality: via encryption ▪integrity checks: digital signatures prevent/detect tampering ▪access restrictions: password-protected VPNs ▪firewalls: specialized “middleboxes” in access and core networks: ▪off-by-default: filter incoming packets to restrict senders, receivers, applications ▪detecting/reacting to DOS attacks Introduction: 1-64
